summary: Created internal/network/publicip.go with PublicIP(client) helper honoring AXON_PUBLIC_IP, falling back from ipv4.icanhazip.com to ifconfig.me/ip with a 10s timeout and 64-byte read limit. Added tests covering env override, primary/fallback services, whitespace trim, max read size, and dual-failure cases. Verified with `go build ./internal/network` and `go test ./internal/network` (7/7 pass).
